auth_notes: Requires a HubSpot Developer Account to create a Private App or standard OAuth2 app. Specific scopes (e.g., crm.objects.contacts.read) must be selected during app creation to match the n8n node requirements.
rate_limits: 100 requests per 10 seconds for Professional/Enterprise tiers; 250,000 to 1,000,000 daily calls depending on the subscription tier.
gotchas: Property internal names often differ from UI labels; developers must use the internal name for API calls.
Associations between objects (e.g., linking a Contact to a Deal) require separate operations or specific ID mapping.
The 'Search' operation is limited to 10,000 results; for larger datasets, 'Get All' with pagination is required.
client_must_provide: OAuth2 Client ID and Client Secret (if using custom app)
List of custom properties and their internal names
Super Admin access for initial authentication
research_notes: While 'Enterprise CRM' is a broad category, the n8n-nodes-base.hubspot node is highly mature. For Salesforce or Zoho, complexity scores would increase to 6/10 due to more rigid schema and auth requirements.

effort_recommendation.rationale: While 'Enterprise CRM' is a broad category, the n8n-nodes-base.hubspot node is highly mature. For Salesforce or Zoho, complexity scores would increase to 6/10 due to more rigid schema and auth requirements.
